parameters.name: prompt
parameters.value: ={{ 'You are an expert invoice parser and data extraction system. Your task is to extract information from the provided invoice text and return a structured JSON object. Extract the following fields. If a field is missing or cannot be found, use null. - vendor: (string) The name of the vendor or supplier. - vendor_uid: (string) The vendor tax ID. - invoice_number: (string) The unique invoice number. - invoice_date: (string) Date issued (YYYY-MM-DD). - due_date: (string) Payment due (YYYY-MM-DD). - net_amount: (number) Total before tax. - vat_amount: (number) Total tax. - vat_percent: (number) Tax rate. - gross_amount: (number) Total with tax. - currency: (string) 3-letter currency code. - cost_center: (string) likely department. - line_items: (array of objects with description, quantity, unit_price, total). - confidence_score: (number 0-1). - anomalies: (array of strings). Return ONLY valid JSON. Invoice Text:\n' + $json.text }}
